zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Bruce於1370年出生在蘇格蘭可拉可曼南史爾時，她的父親Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannan30歲，母親Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland22歲。她於1390年之前與John Chesham在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1427年在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Bruce于1370年出生在苏格兰可拉可曼南史爾时，她的父亲Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannan30岁，母亲Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland22岁。她于1390年之前与John Chesham在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1427年在苏格兰米德洛迪安享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bruce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from a place in Normandy, probably from Brix (La Manche).

History: The son of the Domesday baron, a friend of David I of Scotland, was granted by him the Lordship of Annandale in 1124, and his second son Robert became the founder of the Scottish house of Bruce. — This surname (see 2 above) is listed along with its original form Brousse in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Brousse
meanings: French: topographic name for someone living in a scrubby area, from Old French bro(u)ce ‘thicket, brushwood’ (from Late Latin bruscia), or a habitational name from any of several places in France named Brousse. Compare Bruce and Brusse .

History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its altered form Bruce) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Brewis
meanings: (of Norman origin): habitational name from Briouze in Orne.
(Northumberland and Durham): topographic name or nickname from Middle English breuhous ‘brewery’ (literally ‘brew house’).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Bruce was born in 1370, in Clackmannanshire, Scotland, her father, Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannan, was 30 and her mother, Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland, was 22. She married John Chesham before 1390, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1427, in Midlothian, Scotland, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Bruce est née en 1370, à Clackmannanshire, Écosse, son père, Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannan, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John Chesham avant 1390, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1427, à Midlothian, Écosse, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Bruce 1370 in Clackmannanshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannan 30 und ihre Mutter Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland 22. Sie hat vor 1390 in Europa John Chesham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1427 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Midlothian, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Bruce è nata il nel 1370 nel Clackmannanshire, Scotland, sua padre, Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannan, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato John Chesham prima del 1390, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1427, nel Midlothian, Scotland, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Bruceが1370年にスコットランドクラクマナンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannanは30歳，母Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotlandは22歳であった。1390年以前にヨーロッパでJohn Cheshamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1427年にスコットランドミドロスアンで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Bruce(이)가 1370년 스컷랜드 클랙먼아실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannan(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1390년 이전 우럽에서 John Chesham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1427년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Bruce nasceu em 1370, em Clackmannanshire, Scotland, seu pai, Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannan, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com John Chesham antes 1390, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1427, em Midlothian, Scotland, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Bruce родилась в 1370 г. в местности клаккманнаньшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannan было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Chesham перед 1390 г. в местности Европа. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1427 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Bruce nació en 1370, en Clackmannanshire, Scotland, su papá, Robert Bruce 2nd Baron of Clackmannan, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Isabella Euphame Stewart Princess of Scotland, tenía 22 años. Se casó con John Chesham antes de 1390, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1427, en Midlothian, Scotland, a la edad de 57 años.
